mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.site_id, r.tool_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, s.name as site_name, t.tool_name as tool_name FROM gb_site_atomic_tool_relations r LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id LEFT JOIN gb_atomic_tool t ON r.tool_id = t.id WHERE r.site_id = #{siteId} ORDER BY r.id

SELECT r.id, r.site_id, r.tool_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, s.name as site_name, t.tool_name as tool_name FROM gb_site_atomic_tool_relations r LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id LEFT JOIN gb_atomic_tool t ON r.tool_id = t.id WHERE r.tool_id = #{atomicToolId} ORDER BY r.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gb_site_atomic_tool_relations ( site_id, tool_id, relation_type, is_visible, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{atomicToolId}, #{relationType}, #{isVisible}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

INSERT INTO gb_site_atomic_tool_relations ( site_id, tool_id, relation_type, is_visible, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.siteId}, #{item.atomicToolId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.isVisible}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE relation_type = VALUES(relation_type), is_visible = VALUES(is_visible), update_time = NOW()
